Bash(echo "=== FINAL TEST RESULTS ===" && echo "" && \\
echo "TypeScript SDK:" && cd D:/Sow/packages/sdk && npx vitest run --exclude "src/__tests__/integration.test.ts" 2>&1 | grep "Tests" && \\

echo "" && echo "Rust SDK:" && cd D:/Sow/packages/sdk-rust && cargo test 2>&1 | grep "test result" | head -1 && \\
echo "" && echo "Cross-language wallet:" && \\
cd D:/Sow/packages/sdk && node -e "const{sha256}=require\('@noble/hashes/sha2.js'\);const{Keypair}=require\('@solana/web3.js'\);console.log\('  TS:',Keypair.fromSeed\(sha256\(new Uint8Array\(64\).fill\(42\)\)\).publicKey.toBase58\(\)\)" && \\
cd D:/Sow/packages/sdk-python && python -c "from sow.wallet import derive_wallet;print\('  PY:',derive_wallet\(bytes\([42]*64\)\).pubkey\(\)\)" && \\
echo "" && echo "Next.js build:" && cd D:/Sow && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -c "○\\|ƒ" | xargs -I{} echo "  {} routes, 0 errors" && \\
echo "" && echo "REST API live:" && \\
curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/plans | python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\('  /api/plans:', 'OK' if d['ok'] else 'FAIL'\)" && \\
curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/price | python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\('  /api/price:', 'SOL=$'+str\(d['data']['prices']['SOL']\) if d['ok'] else 'FAIL'\)" && \\
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/roundup -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"txValueUsd":27.63,"plan":"tree"}' | python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\('  /api/roundup:', '$'+str\(d['data']['roundUpUsd']\)+' round-up' if d['ok'] else 'FAIL'\)" && \\
echo "" && echo "=== ALL DONE ===")
